heading: Award of other medals
label: 2746 Award of other medals
text: Coast Guard personnel, notwithstanding the provisions of this chapter, may be awarded medals, bars, emblems, or insignia to which such personnel may be entitled under other provisions of law.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesThis section insures that the preceding sections are not intended to prevent Coast Guard military personnel from receiving other medals, the legion of merit, for example. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 502 of this title

Meritorious Service MedalMedal established as an award for outstanding meritorious achievement or service to the United States, see Ex. Ord. No. 11448, , 34 F.R. 915, as amended, set out as a note preceding , Armed Forces.Jan. 16, 1969section 1121 of Title 10
